name: Wistia
description: Wistia video hosting and analytics platform for businesses

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Wistia
2. Go to Account → API Access
3. Copy the API Password
4. Paste it below

credentialFields.label: API Password
credentialFields.helpText: Wistia → Account → API Access → API Password
